title: Distinct Leaders
description: Visual distinction for zombie leaders. Fully configurable!
body:
## What is this mod?

This mod adds a clear visual marker to zombie leaders, making them instantly recognizable in-game.

### Visual markers (customizable)
- Red banner on top of their head. Just like Pillager captain.
- Red eyes. Essentially just custom texture for zombie. Can be customized with resourcepack.
- Bigger size (not affecting hitbox). Configurable.

## Additional info

In versions before **26.1-Snapshot-1**, zombie leaders spawn with the same health as regular zombies due to [MC-219981](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-219981), but you will still be able to see that they are leaders.

This mod is completely client-side, so you can use it on vanilla servers (if its allowed)

To report bugs/issues message me on discord - o_orl
